description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image. Define a single deploy stage and add a pages job that runs the commands: mkdir .public, cp -r diapositivas/perseidas/* .public, and mv .public public. Configure the job to publish the public/ directory as an artifact and to run only on the master branch. Ensure the job is named pages and is assigned to the deploy stage, targeting GitLab Pages for deployment.
